title: [EPIC] Tracker Feature Flag Review & E2E Validation
description:
🏆 EPIC: [EPIC] Tracker Feature Flag Review & E2E Validation

🎯 Product Vision (BA)

The goal of the [EPIC] Tracker Feature Flag Review & E2E Validation is to safely activate the tracker system through meticulous examination of the codebase and thorough validation across the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). This involves a comprehensive review of code locations where the ENABLE_VIKUNJA feature flag is utilized. Full SDLC test cases need to be completed, focusing on aspects such as design, doing, validation, and done phases, including the Refinery integration to ensure any modifications are meticulously verified before production deployment. **Key requirements include:**

- Ensuring comprehensive code review for ENABLE_VIKUNJA.
- Meeting test cases for all phases of the SDLC.
- Incorporating Refinery integration for validation.
- Enabling the safe deployment of the tracker system.

🛠 Automation Strategy

  • **Utilize static analysis tools** to automatically detect all occurrences of ENABLE_VIKUNJA in the codebase.
  • Implement CI/CD **automated testing pipelines** to run meta-tests on all code changes involving ENABLE_VIKUNJA.
  • Employ **automated logging and monitoring** to ensure continued validation and feedback loop through dashboards.
  • **AI-driven workflow automation** to manage Refinery inputs and outputs efficiently.

🏗 System Architecture (Architect)

# System Design Document: ENABLE_VIKUNJA Feature Flag Integration

## Business Requirements

- **Objective:** Safely activate the tracker system using the ENABLE_VIKUNJA feature flag through a comprehensive review and validation process.
- Ensure rigorous testing and validation across the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
- Incorporate automated processes to improve deployment accuracy and efficiency.

## Recommended Solution Design

- **Automation Strategy:**
- Utilize static analysis tools to detect ENABLE_VIKUNJA occurrences.
- Implement CI/CD automated testing pipelines for running meta-tests.
- Employ automated logging and monitoring with dashboards for continuous feedback.
- Use AI-driven workflow automation for efficient management of Refinery inputs and outputs.

- **IaC Pipeline Impact:**
- Employ **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)** for consistent feature activation across environments.
- Use Terraform or Ansible for scripting necessary infrastructure changes.
- Implement automated rollback scripts through IaC for quick environment restoration.

- **SRE Fallback Scenarios:**
- Instantly rollback to the last stable IaC state in case of deployment issues.
- Trigger automated alerts and SRE intervention for unusual log patterns.

## Acceptance Criteria

- **REQ-1: Logging Mechanism**
- Log all instances where ENABLE_VIKUNJA is invoked.
- Ensure logs can be filtered and aggregated in real-time dashboards.
- Include necessary context information like timestamp and user.

- **REQ-2: Refinery Integration**
- Integrate Refinery to handle all pre-prod validation tasks.
- Ensure all Refinery tasks complete with zero errors.
- Log detailed reports on test coverage and results.

- **REQ-3: Security Audit**
- Conduct a security audit targeting ENABLE_VIKUNJA related changes.
- Ensure no critical vulnerabilities are found.
- Document and address all identified security risks with mitigation strategies.

[AGENT_SIGNATURE]

🛡 Operations & Infrastructure (SRE/CICD)

  • IaC Impact:
    The implementation leverages **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)** to maintain consistency across environments for the ENABLE_VIKUNJA feature activation. IaC scripts will automate provisioning of test environments that replicate production conditions, ensuring accurate testing scenarios. **Technical specifics include:**

    - Utilizing tools like Terraform or Ansible to script infrastructure changes needed for ENABLE_VIKUNJA testing.
    - Automated rollback scripts triggered by IaC to swiftly revert environments to stable states in case of test failures.
  • Security Posture:
    Standard BestFam security rules apply.
  • Resiliency:
    Automatic SRE Fallback enabled.

Status: In Design Review. Please see comments for outstanding questions.


🎮 Gameplay & Engagement (Game Designer)

  • questions

🛡 Infrastructure & Ops (SRE/Architect)

  • How will you handle versioning and compatibility of the ENABLE_VIKUNJA feature flag across different environments?
  • What specific metrics will be monitored in the logging and monitoring system to ensure the successful deployment of the ENABLE_VIKUNJA feature?
  • What strategies will be implemented to ensure that automated rollback scripts run smoothly without causing downtime or data inconsistencies?

Please answer these in the comments below to finalize the design. [AGENT_SIGNATURE]
